section.heading: Change of venue

content.p: A district court may transfer a case or proceeding under title 11 to a district court for another district, in the interest of justice or for the convenience of the parties.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 98–353, title I, § 102(a), July 10, 1984, 98 Stat. 335.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective July 10, 1984, see section 122(a) of Pub. L. 98–353, set out as a note under section 151 of this title.
